name: Jacqueline Novak
bio: Jacqueline Novak is an American stand-up comedian, writer, and author best known for her one-woman show Get on Your Knees, a literary and philosophical meditation on sex and coming of age. The show ran off-Broadway after debuting at the Edinburgh Festival Fringe, earned a Drama Desk nomination, and was later filmed for Netflix. She also co-hosts the comedy podcast Poog.

timeline.ev: Premieres the show at the Edinburgh Fringe
Get on Your Knees runs off-Broadway
Nominated for a Drama Desk Award for the solo show
Netflix special Get on Your Knees released
Emmy nomination for writing the special

accolades: 2020 Drama Desk Award nomination for Outstanding Solo Performance
2024 Emmy nomination for Outstanding Writing for a Variety Special
New York Times Critic's Pick for Get on Your Knees
